title: 日本ダービーにむけて

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
The Japanese Derby... the race that decides the
top classic-year runner.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
It's every Umamusume's dream to earn the title of
Derby champion.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
And today, in front of everybody, I'm going to
prove myself!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: They'll never see me the same way again!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Hey, way to kill the mood.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Can't you see I'm at peak hype levels right now?
Don't make me lose it.
choice_data_list: You can't overturn your reputation all at once.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
What? But if the Derby can't change it, then what
can?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Don't you have anything better to say? You're
supposed to be my trainer—we talked about this
already, remember?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: You do want to be known as a Derby trainer, don't you?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Then you need to say something to get me extra
pumped! Go on!
choice_data_list: Go give it your all and be yourself!
Go give it your all and be yourself!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Of course I will! Next time I talk to you...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
I won't be City the model, but City the Derby
champion!
